title: Introducing the Updates Hub
excerpt: We're excited to announce the new Updates Hub, your central destination for all platform updates. Stay informed about new features, bug fixes, roadmap progress, and important announcements all in one place.

title: Sprint 2026.04-A Release
excerpt: This sprint brings major improvements to the admin dashboard, enhanced search capabilities, and critical security updates across the platform.

releaseNotes.title: New Features
items: Updates Hub - centralized view for all platform updates
Admin dashboard redesign with glassmorphism styling
Real-time notifications system with push support
Advanced filtering on roadmap and releases pages

releaseNotes.title: Improvements
items: Faster page load times with optimized asset loading
Improved accessibility compliance (WCAG 2.1 AA)
Better mobile responsiveness for admin pages
Enhanced search indexing with typo tolerance

releaseNotes.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed sidebar navigation state persistence
Resolved dark mode flickering on page transitions
Fixed ticket attachment upload progress display

title: Sprint 2026.03-B Release
excerpt: This release focuses on performance optimizations and developer experience improvements, along with several requested features from our feedback portal.

releaseNotes.title: New Features
items: Custom themes support with color palette picker
Export functionality for analytics reports
Keyboard shortcuts for power users

releaseNotes.title: Improvements
items: Reduced bundle size by 23% through tree shaking
Optimized database queries for faster load times
Improved error messages with actionable guidance

releaseNotes.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed session timeout handling
Resolved calendar timezone issues
Fixed email notification delivery delays

title: Dashboard Widget Loading Issue
excerpt: Resolved an issue where dashboard widgets would fail to load intermittently, particularly during high-traffic periods.

title: Ticket Creation Timeout on Mobile
excerpt: Investigating reports of ticket creation failing with timeout errors on mobile devices when attaching large files.

title: AI-Powered Content Suggestions
excerpt: Implementing AI-powered content suggestions for knowledge base articles, helping editors create more comprehensive documentation faster.

title: Multi-Language Support
excerpt: Adding comprehensive multi-language support with automatic translation capabilities and locale-specific content management.
